sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 46

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 46:1
items.html: (to the question) The hinge upon the two Vavs is the force that shapes the newborn, being the dwelling for the two Heys, from which the force of shaping comes. See the end of Answer 28. (p. 788, Item 83; and p. 797, beginning "And this is what it says")
